env: A GPU host matching `{{platform}}` with a running RTVI-CV container reachable at `http://localhost:9000/api/v1` (start it with the DEPLOY flow before running these checks — see `eval/deploy-evals.json`). The container must already have at least the readiness, liveness, startup, metrics, and stream-management endpoints reachable. `docker`, `curl`, and `jq` available on the host. This eval exercises the API USAGE flow of the `vss-deploy-detection-tracking-2d` skill against the live REST endpoint — it must not invoke `/deploy`, redeploy the container, or call any VSS profile.

expects.query: Add a stream rtsp://10.0.0.1:8554/cam1 with id cam_entrance to rtvi-cv.
checks: The agent calls `POST http://localhost:9000/api/v1/stream/add` against the live RTVI-CV instance.
The request body contains `camera_url` exactly equal to `rtsp://10.0.0.1:8554/cam1` and a `camera_id` of `cam_entrance`.
The agent renders the curl command in a confirmation box BEFORE executing the POST (per the skill's universal API-box rule).
The agent renders the API response as a formatted table or structured block.
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.

expects.query: Is rtvi-cv ready? Check the health.
checks: The agent calls all three readiness endpoints: `GET http://localhost:9000/api/v1/live`, `/api/v1/ready`, and `/api/v1/startup`.
The agent uses GET requests (read-only) and does not require per-call user confirmation.
The final response is a combined summary of the live, ready, and startup states (e.g. all three returned 200, or which one failed).
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.

expects.query: What is the FPS on all streams? Get rtvi-cv metrics.
checks: The agent calls `GET http://localhost:9000/api/v1/metrics`.
The final response presents per-stream FPS plus at least one of {GPU utilization, GPU memory, CPU usage} in a formatted table or structured block.
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.

expects.query: List all active streams in rtvi-cv.
checks: The agent calls `GET http://localhost:9000/api/v1/stream/get-stream-info`.
The final response presents active streams as a formatted table with at least camera id and stream URL columns (status when available).
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.

expects.query: Add a stream to rtvi-cv running at http://10.99.99.99:9000.
checks: The agent probes the user-supplied URL `http://10.99.99.99:9000` (not localhost) when attempting service discovery.
The agent reports the connectivity failure clearly with an error message such as `could not reach`, `connection refused`, `unreachable`, or `service not running`.
The agent suggests verifying that the RTVI-CV container is running and that port 9000 is reachable on the supplied host.
The agent does NOT silently fall back to `http://localhost:9000` and issue `/stream/add` against it.
The final response does not contain plaintext API tokens matching the pattern `(Bearer |sk-|glpat-|nvapi-)[A-Za-z0-9+/=_-]{10,}`.
